- default: Unexpected error

##### PUT /me

Summary: Update the current user object

Update the current user object.

Request body: application/json

Responses:
- 200: User response
- 401: Unauthorized
- 403: Forbidden
- 500: Internal error
- default: Unexpected error

##### GET /me/accounts

Summary: Get all accounts belonging to the current user

Get all accounts belonging to the current user.

Responses:
- 200: Account response
- 401: Unauthorized
- 403: Forbidden
- 500: Internal error
- default: Unexpected error

##### GET /me/wls

Summary: Get work-life score chart data for the current user

Get work-life score chart data for the current user.

Responses:
- 200: WLS chart data
- 401: Unauthorized
- 403: Forbidden
- 500: Internal error
- default: Unexpected error

##### GET /me/current_account

Summary: Get the current account

Get the current user account.

Responses:
- 200: Account response
- 401: Unauthorized
- 403: Forbidden
- 500: Internal error
- default: Unexpected error

##### PUT /me/current_account

Summary: Update the current account

Update the current user account. \ The current account may be a `User`, `Team`, or `TeamMember` type.

Parameters:
- `current_account_id` (query, integer, required) — The polymorphic Account ID
- `current_account_type` (query, string, required) — The polymorphic Account Type (`User`, `Team`, `TeamMember`)

Responses:
- 200: Account response
- 401: Unauthorized
- 403: Forbidden
- 500: Internal error
- default: Unexpected error

##### GET /me/settings

Summary: Get user settings

Get user settings objects.

Responses:
- 200: Setting response
- 401: Unauthorized
- 403: Forbidden
- 500: Internal error
- default: Unexpected error

##### GET /me/settings/{name}

Summary: Get user setting value

Get a user setting value.

Parameters:
- `name` (path, string, required) — Setting name

Responses:
- 200: Setting response
- 401: Unauthorized
- 403: Forbidden
- 500: Internal error
- default: Unexpected error

##### PUT /me/settings/{name}

Summary: Update user setting value

Update a user setting value.

Parameters:
- `name` (path, string, required) — Setting name

Request body: application/json

Responses:
- 200: Setting response
- 401: Unauthorized
- 403: Forbidden
- 500: Internal error
- default: Unexpected error

##### DELETE /me/settings/{name}

Summary: Delete user setting value

Delete a user setting value.

Parameters:
- `name` (path, string, required) — Setting name

Responses:
- 204: No content
- 401: Unauthorized
- 403: Forbidden
- 500: Internal error
- default: Unexpected error

##### POST /users

Summary: Create a User on the system

Create a User on the system.

Request body: application/json

Responses:
- 200: User response
- 201: User response
- 401: Unauthorized
- 403: Forbidden
- 422: Validation error
- 500: Internal error
- default: Unexpected error

##### POST /users/{id}/send_verification_sms

Summary: Send a verification SMS

Send an account verification SMS to the user's mobile number.

Parameters:
- `id` (path, integer, required) — User id

Responses:
- 200: Success response
- 401: Unauthorized
- 403: Forbidden
- 500: Internal error
- default: Unexpected error

##### POST /users/{id}/send_verification_email

Summary: Send a verification email

Send an account verification email to the user's email address.

Parameters:
- `id` (path, integer, required) — User id

Responses:
- 200: Success response
- 401: Unauthorized
- 403: Forbidden
- 500: Internal error
- default: Unexpected error

##### POST /users/reset_password

Summary: Reset a user password

Reset a user password for the account associated with the provided email address or mobile number.

Parameters:
- `login` (query, string, required) — The user email address or mobile number

Responses:
- 200: Success response
- 401: Unauthorized
- 403: Forbidden
- 500: Internal error
- default: Unexpected error

##### POST /teams

Summary: Create a team

Create a team.

Responses:
- 201: Team response
- 401: Unauthorized
- 403: Forbidden
- 500: Internal error
- default: Unexpected error

##### GET /team

Summary: Get the current team object

Get the current team object.

Responses:
- 200: Team response
- 401: Unauthorized
- 403: Forbidden
- 500: Internal error
- default: Unexpected error

##### PUT /team

Summary: Update the current team object

Update the current team object.

Request body: application/json

Responses:
- 200: Team response
- 401: Unauthorized
- 403: Forbidden
- 500: Internal error
- default: Unexpected error

##### GET /team/settings

Summary: Get team settings

Get team settings objects.

Responses:
- 200: Setting response
- 401: Unauthorized
- 403: Forbidden
- 500: Internal error
- default: Unexpected error

##### PATCH /team/features

Summary: Update team features

Bulk update team feature flags. Unknown keys are ignored.

Request body: application/json

Responses:
- 200: Updated team features
- 401: Unauthorized
- 403: Forbidden
- 500: Internal error
- default: Unexpected error

##### GET /team/settings/{name}

Summary: Get team setting value

Get a team setting value.

Parameters:
- `name` (path, string, required) — Setting name

Responses:
- 200: Setting response
- 401: Unauthorized
- 403: Forbidden
- 500: Internal error
- default: Unexpected error

##### PUT /team/settings/{name}

Summary: Update team setting value

Update a team setting value.

Parameters:
- `name` (path, string, required) — Setting name

Request body: application/json

Responses:
- 200: Setting response
- 401: Unauthorized
- 403: Forbidden
- 500: Internal error
- default: Unexpected error

##### DELETE /team/settings/{name}

Summary: Delete team setting value

Delete a team setting value.

Parameters:
- `name` (path, string, required) — Setting name

Responses:
- 204: No content
- 401: Unauthorized
- 403: Forbidden
- 500: Internal error
- default: Unexpected error

##### POST /team/demo_data/apply

Summary: Apply demo data

Apply industry-specific demo data to the current team.

Request body: application/json

Responses:
- 200: Demo data sync started successfully
- 400: Invalid seed type
- 401: Unauthorized
- 500: Internal error

##### DELETE /team/demo_data/reset

Summary: Reset demo data

Remove all generated demo data from the current team.

Responses:
- 200: Demo data reset successfully
- 401: Unauthorized
- 500: Internal error

##### GET /team/members

Summary: Get all members belonging to the current team

Get all members belonging to the current team.

Responses:
- 200: TeamMember response
- 401: Unauthorized
- 403: Forbidden
- 500: Internal error
- default: Unexpected error

##### GET /team/members/{user_id}

Summary: Get a team member

Get a single team member object by it's corresponding user ID.

Parameters:
- `user_id` (path, integer, required) — User user_id

Responses:
- 200: TeamMember response
- 401: Unauthorized
- 403: Forbidden
- 500: Internal error
- default: Unexpected error

##### PUT /team/members/{user_id}

Summary: Update a team member

Update a single team member object.

Parameters:
- `user_id` (path, integer, required) — User user_id

Request body: application/json

Responses:
- 200: TeamMember response
- 401: Unauthorized
- 403: Forbidden
- 500: Internal error
- default: Unexpected error

##### POST /team/members/invite

Summary: Invite team member

Invite a member to the current team.

Request body: application/json

Responses:
- 200: TeamMember response
- 401: Unauthorized
- 403: Forbidden
- 500: Internal error
- default: Unexpected error

##### GET /developers

Summary: Get all developers on the system

Get all developers on the system.

Responses:
- 200: Developer response
- 401: Unauthorized
- 403: Forbidden
- 500: Internal error
- default: Unexpected error

##### GET /developers/{id}

Summary: Get a developer

Get a developer object by user ID.

Parameters:
- `id` (path, integer, required) — Developer id

Responses:
- 200: Developer response
- 401: Unauthorized
- 403: Forbidden
- 500: Internal error
- default: Unexpected error

##### GET /developers/{id}/addons

Summary: Get developer addons

Get all addons for a specific developer.

Parameters:
- `id` (path, integer, required) — Developer id

Responses:
- 200: Addon response
- 401: Unauthorized
- 403: Forbidden
- 500: Internal error
- default: Unexpected error

##### GET /developers/{id}/actions

Summary: Get developer actions

Get all actions for a specific developer.

Parameters:
- `id` (path, integer, required) — Developer id

Responses:
- 200: Action response
- 401: Unauthorized
- 403: Forbidden
- 500: Internal error
- default: Unexpected error

##### GET /chats

Summary: Get chat rooms

Get all chat rooms.

Responses:
- 200: Chat response
- 401: Unauthorized
- 403: Forbidden
- 500: Internal error
- default: Unexpected error

##### POST /chats

Summary: Create chat room

Create a chat room with multiple users.

Request body: application/json

Responses:
- 201: Chat response
- 401: Unauthorized
- 403: Forbidden
- 500: Internal error
- default: Unexpected error

##### POST /chats/initiate

Summary: Get or create chat room

Get or create a chat room with multiple given users.

Request body: application/json

Responses:
- 200: Chat response
- 401: Unauthorized
- 403: Forbidden
- 500: Internal error
- default: Unexpected error

##### GET /chats/{id}

Summary: Get chat

Get a single chat object by it's ID.

Parameters:
- `id` (path, integer, required) — Chat id

Responses:
- 200: Chat response
- 401: Unauthorized
- 403: Forbidden
- 500: Internal error
- default: Unexpected error

##### PUT /chats/{id}

Summary: Update chat

Update a chat object.

Parameters:
- `id` (path, integer, required) — Chat id

Request body: application/json

Responses:
- 200: Chat response
- 401: Unauthorized
- 403: Forbidden
- 500: Internal error
- default: Unexpected error

##### DELETE /chats/{id}

Summary: Delete chat

Delete a chat object.

Parameters:
- `id` (path, integer, required) — Chat id

Request body: application/json

Responses:
- 200: Chat response
- 401: Unauthorized
- 403: Forbidden
- 500: Internal error
- default: Unexpected error

##### GET /chats/{chat_id}/messages

Summary: Get chat messages

Get all messages belonging to the given chat.

Parameters:
- `chat_id` (path, integer, required) — Chat chat_id

Responses:
- 200: Message response
- 401: Unauthorized
- 403: Forbidden
- 500: Internal error
- default: Unexpected error

##### POST /chats/{chat_id}/messages

Summary: Create create message

Create a chat and send it to the chat participants.

Parameters:
- `chat_id` (path, integer, required) — Chat chat_id

Request body: application/json

Responses:
- 201: Message response
- 401: Unauthorized
- 403: Forbidden
- 429: Rate limit error
- 500: Internal error
- default: Unexpected error

##### GET /chats/{chat_id}/messages/{id}

Summary: Get chat message

Get a chat message belonging to the given chat.

Parameters:
- `chat_id` (path, integer, required) — Chat chat_id
- `id` (path, integer, required) — Message id

Responses:
- 200: Message response
- 401: Unauthorized
- 403: Forbidden
- 500: Internal error
- default: Unexpected error

##### DELETE /chats/{chat_id}/messages/{id}

Summary: Delete chat message

Delete a chat message belonging to the given chat.

Parameters:
- `chat_id` (path, integer, required) — Chat chat_id
- `id` (path, integer, required) — Message id

Responses:
- 200: Message response
- 401: Unauthorized
- 403: Forbidden
- 500: Internal error
- default: Unexpected error

##### GET /chats/{chat_id}/users

Summary: Get chat users

Get all users participating in the given chat.

Parameters:
- `chat_id` (path, integer, required) — Chat chat_id

Responses:
- 200: ChatUser response
- 401: Unauthorized
- 403: Forbidden
- 500: Internal error
- default: Unexpected error

##### POST /chats/{chat_id}/users

Summary: Create chat user

Create and add a user to the chat.

Parameters:
- `chat_id` (path, integer, required) — Chat chat_id

Request body: application/json

Responses:
- 201: ChatUser response
- 401: Unauthorized
- 403: Forbidden
- 500: Internal error
- default: Unexpected error

##### DELETE /chats/{chat_id}/users/{user_id}

Summary: Delete chat user

Delete a chat user.

Parameters:
- `chat_id` (path, integer, required) — Chat chat_id
- `user_id` (path, integer, required) — User user_id

Responses:
- 200: ChatUser response
- 401: Unauthorized
- 403: Forbidden
- 500: Internal error
- default: Unexpected error

##### POST /chats/{chat_id}/reactions

Summary: Create reaction

Create a reaction to a message in the chat.

Parameters:
- `chat_id` (path, integer, required) — Chat chat_id

Request body: application/json

Responses:
- 201: MessageFlag response
- 401: Unauthorized
- 403: Forbidden
- 500: Internal error
- default: Unexpected error

##### DELETE /chats/{chat_id}/reactions/{id}

Summary: Delete reaction

Delete a reaction from a message.

Parameters:
- `chat_id` (path, integer, required) — Chat chat_id
- `id` (path, integer, required) — MessageFlag id

Responses:
- 200: MessageFlag response
- 401: Unauthorized
- 403: Forbidden
- 500: Internal error
- default: Unexpected error

##### POST /messages

Summary: Create and send a chat message to the receiver

Create and send a chat message to the receiver.

Request body: application/json

Responses:
- 201: Message response
- 401: Unauthorized
- 403: Forbidden
- 500: Internal error
- default: Unexpected error

##### PUT /messages/{id}

Summary: Update message

Update a message object.

Parameters:
- `id` (path, integer, required) — Message id

Request body: application/json

Responses:
- 200: Message response
- 401: Unauthorized
- 403: Forbidden
- 500: Internal error
- default: Unexpected error

##### DELETE /messages/{id}

Summary: Delete message

Delete a message object.

Parameters:
- `id` (path, integer, required) — Message id

Request body: application/json

Responses:
- 200: Message response
- 401: Unauthorized
- 403: Forbidden
- 500: Internal error
- default: Unexpected error

##### GET /messages/recent

Summary: Get recent chat messages

Get recent chat messages for the current account scope.

Responses:
- 200: Message response
- 401: Unauthorized
- 403: Forbidden
- 500: Internal error
- default: Unexpected error

Summary: Get favorite chat messages

Responses:
- 200: Message response
- 401: Unauthorized
- 403: Forbidden
- 500: Internal error
- default: Unexpected error

##### GET /addons

Summary: Get all addons

Responses:
- 200: Addon response
- 401: Unauthorized
- 403: Forbidden
- 500: Internal error
- default: Unexpected error

##### GET /addons/recommended

Summary: Get recommended addons

Responses:
- 200: Addon response
- 401: Unauthorized
- 403: Forbidden
- 500: Internal error
- default: Unexpected error

##### GET /addons/popular

Summary: Get popular addons

Get all addons in order of popularity.

Responses:
- 200: Addon response
- 401: Unauthorized
- 403: Forbidden
- 500: Internal error
- default: Unexpected error

##### GET /addons/installed

Summary: Get installed addons

Get all addons installed for the current team or user.

Responses:
- 200: Addon response
- 401: Unauthorized
- 403: Forbidden
- 500: Internal error
- default: Unexpected error

##### GET /addons/{package}

Summary: Get an addon

Get an addon by it's package name.

Parameters:
- `package` (path, string, required) — Addon package

Responses:
- 200: Addon response
- 401: Unauthorized
- 403: Forbidden
- 500: Internal error
- default: Unexpected error

##### POST /addons/{package}/report

Summary: Report addon as inappropriate

Report addon as inappropriate.

Parameters:
- `package` (path, string, required) — Addon package

Responses:
- 200: Success response
- 401: Unauthorized
- 403: Forbidden
- 500: Internal error
- default: Unexpected error

##### GET /actions

Summary: Get all actions

Get all available actions.

Responses:
- 200: Action response
- 401: Unauthorized
- 403: Forbidden
- 500: Internal error
- default: Unexpected error

##### GET /actions/popular

Summary: Get popular actions

Get all actions in order of popularity.

Responses:
- 200: Action response
- 401: Unauthorized
- 403: Forbidden
- 500: Internal error
- default: Unexpected error

##### GET /actions/installed

Summary: Get installed actions

Get all installed actions for the current team or user.

Responses:
- 200: Action response
- 401: Unauthorized
- 403: Forbidden
- 500: Internal error
- default: Unexpected error

##### GET /actions/recent

Summary: Get recent actions

Get recently used actions for the current team or user.

Responses:
- 200: Action response
- 401: Unauthorized
- 403: Forbidden
- 500: Internal error
- default: Unexpected error

##### GET /actions/{id}

Summary: Get action

Get a specific action by ID.

Parameters:
- `id` (path, string, required) — Action id

Responses:
- 200: Action response
- 401: Unauthorized
- 403: Forbidden
- 500: Internal error
- default: Unexpected error

##### GET /actions/{id}/variables

Summary: Get action variables

Get variables for a specific action.

Parameters:
- `id` (path, string, required) — Action id

Responses:
- 200: object response
- 401: Unauthorized
- 403: Forbidden
- 500: Internal error
- default: Unexpected error

##### GET /actions/installs

Summary: List action installs

Get all action installs for the current team or user.

Responses:
- 200: ActionInstall response
- 401: Unauthorized
- 403: Forbidden
- 500: Internal error
- default: Unexpected error

##### POST /actions/installs

Summary: Install action

Install an action for the current team or user.

Request body: application/json

Responses:
- 201: Action response
- 401: Unauthorized
- 403: Forbidden
- 500: Internal error
- default: Unexpected error

##### GET /actions/installs/{id}

Summary: Get installed action

Get an action install by ID.

Parameters:
- `id` (path, string, required) — ActionInstall id

Responses:
- 200: ActionInstall response
- 401: Unauthorized
- 403: Forbidden
- 500: Internal error
- default: Unexpected error

##### PUT /actions/installs/{id}

Summary: Update action install

Update an action install.

Parameters:
- `id` (path, string, required) — ActionInstall id

Request body: application/json

Responses:
- 200: ActionInstall response
- 401: Unauthorized
- 403: Forbidden
- 500: Internal error
- default: Unexpected error

##### DELETE /actions/installs/{id}

Summary: Delete installed action

Delete an action install.

Parameters:
- `id` (path, string, required) — ActionInstall id

Responses:
- 200: ActionInstall response
- 401: Unauthorized
- 403: Forbidden
- 500: Internal error
- default: Unexpected error

##### GET /actions/installs/{id}/run

Summary: Run an action

Run an installed action.

Parameters:
- `id` (path, string, required) — ActionInstall id

Request body: application/json

Responses:
- 200: Action response
- 401: Unauthorized
- 403: Forbidden
- 500: Internal error
- default: Unexpected error

##### GET /actions/installs/{id}/run_later

Summary: Run an action later

Schedule an installed action to run later.

Parameters:
- `id` (path, string, required) — ActionInstall id

Responses:
- 200: Action response
- 401: Unauthorized
- 403: Forbidden
- 500: Internal error
- default: Unexpected error

##### GET /actions/installs/{id}/history

Summary: Get action event history

Get history for an installed action.

Parameters:
- `id` (path, string, required) — ActionInstall id

Responses:
- 200: AuditLog response
- 401: Unauthorized
- 403: Forbidden
- 500: Internal error
- default: Unexpected error

##### GET /fragments

Summary: Get fragments

Get all fragments.

Responses:
- 200: Fragment response
- 401: Unauthorized
- 403: Forbidden
- 500: Internal error
- default: Unexpected error

##### POST /fragments

Summary: Create an fragment

Create an fragment

Request body: application/json

Responses:
- 201: Fragment response
- 401: Unauthorized
- 403: Forbidden
- 500: Internal error
- default: Unexpected error

##### GET /fragments/{id}

Summary: Get an fragment

Get an fragment object.

Parameters:
- `id` (path, integer, required) — Fragment id

Responses:
- 200: Fragment response
- 401: Unauthorized
- 403: Forbidden
- 500: Internal error
- default: Unexpected error

##### PUT /fragments/{id}

Summary: Update an fragment

Update an fragment object.

Parameters:
- `id` (path, integer, required) — Fragment id

Request body: application/json

Responses:
- 200: Fragment response
- 401: Unauthorized
- 403: Forbidden
- 500: Internal error
- default: Unexpected error

##### DELETE /fragments/{id}

Summary: Delete an fragment

Delete an fragment object.

Parameters:
- `id` (path, integer, required) — Fragment id

Responses:
- 200: Fragment response
- 401: Unauthorized
- 403: Forbidden
- 500: Internal error
- default: Unexpected error

##### GET /contacts

Summary: Get contacts

Get all contacts belonging to the current account.

Responses:
- 200: Contact response
- 401: Unauthorized
- 403: Forbidden
- 500: Internal error
- default: Unexpected error

##### POST /contacts

Summary: Create contact

Create a contact for a user that may not already exist on Tommy. The created user will be invited to join the current user or team.

Request body: application/json

Responses:
- 201: Contact response
- 401: Unauthorized
- 403: Forbidden
- 500: Internal error
- default: Unexpected error

##### GET /contacts/{friend_id}

Summary: Get a contact

Get a contact object by friend user ID.

Parameters:
- `friend_id` (path, integer, required) — User friend_id

Responses:
- 200: Contact response
- 401: Unauthorized
- 403: Forbidden
- 500: Internal error
- default: Unexpected error

##### PUT /contacts/{friend_id}

Summary: Update a contact

Update a single contact object.

Parameters:
- `friend_id` (path, integer, required) — User friend_id

Request body: application/json

Responses:
- 200: Contact response
- 401: Unauthorized
- 403: Forbidden
- 500: Internal error
- default: Unexpected error

##### POST /contacts/import

Summary: Import bulk contacts

Import bulk contacts from a mobile phone or other device. Imported contacts must provide `first_name` and `mobile` or `email` parameters.

Request body: application/json

Responses:
- 201: Contact response
- 401: Unauthorized
- 403: Forbidden
- 500: Internal error
- default: Unexpected error

##### POST /contacts/{friend_id}/add

Summary: Send contact request

Send a contact request to join the given user or team.

Parameters:
- `friend_id` (path, integer, required) — User friend_id

Request body: application/json

Responses:
- 201: Contact response
- 401: Unauthorized
- 403: Forbidden
- 500: Internal error
- default: Unexpected error

##### POST /contacts/{friend_id}/invite

Summary: Invite contact

Invite the given user to become a contact of the current user or team.

Parameters:
- `friend_id` (path, integer, required) — User friend_id

Responses:
- 201: Contact response
- 401: Unauthorized
- 403: Forbidden
- 500: Internal error
- default: Unexpected error

##### POST /contacts/{friend_id}/accept

Summary: Accept contact request

Accept an incoming contact request from the given user.

Parameters:
- `friend_id` (path, integer, required) — User friend_id

Request body: application/json

Responses:
- 200: Contact response
- 401: Unauthorized
- 403: Forbidden
- 500: Internal error
- default: Unexpected error

##### POST /contacts/{friend_id}/decline

Summary: Reject contact request

Reject an incoming contact request from the given user.

Parameters:
- `friend_id` (path, integer, required) — User friend_id

Responses:
- 200: Contact response
- 401: Unauthorized
- 403: Forbidden
- 500: Internal error
- default: Unexpected error

##### GET /invitations

Summary: Get all invitations associated with the current account

Get all invitations associated with the current account.

Responses:
- 200: Invitation response
- 401: Unauthorized
- 403: Forbidden
- 500: Internal error
- default: Unexpected error

##### POST /invitations

Summary: Create invitation

Create an invitation link for a member or non-menmer to connect with the current user or team.

Request body: application/json

Responses:
- 201: Invitation response
- 401: Unauthorized
- 403: Forbidden
- 500: Internal error
- default: Unexpected error

##### GET /invitations/{token}

Summary: Get invitations

Get an invitations object by token.

Parameters:
- `token` (path, integer, required) — Invitation token

Responses:
- 200: Invitation response
- 401: Unauthorized
- 403: Forbidden
- 500: Internal error
- default: Unexpected error

##### GET /invitations/{token}/accept

Summary: Accept an invitation

Accept an invitation belonging to the given token.

Parameters:
- `token` (path, string, required) — Invitation token

Responses:
- 200: Invitation response
- 401: Unauthorized
- 403: Forbidden
- 500: Internal error
- default: Unexpected error

##### GET /invitations/{token}/decline

Summary: Reject an invitation

Parameters:
- `token` (path, string, required) — Invitation token

Responses:
- 200: Invitation response
- 401: Unauthorized
- 403: Forbidden
- 500: Internal error
- default: Unexpected error

- 403: Forbidden
- 500: Internal error
- default: Unexpected error

##### POST /sessions

Summary: Login

This method handles users who are \ authenticating with an email or phone, and password combination.

Request body: application/json

Responses:
- 200: User response
- 401: Unauthorized
- 403: Forbidden
- 500: Internal error
- default: Unexpected error

##### DELETE /sessions

Summary: Logout

This method destroys the current user session.

Responses:
- 200: Success response
- 401: Unauthorized
- 403: Forbidden
- 500: Internal error
- default: Unexpected error

##### POST /tags

Summary: Create a tag

Request body: application/json

Responses:
- 201: Null response
- 401: Unauthorized
- 403: Forbidden
- 422: Validation error
- 500: Internal error

##### GET /tags/{id}

Summary: Get a tag

Get a tag object.

Parameters:
- `id` (path, integer, required) — Tag id

Responses:
- 200: Tag response
- 401: Unauthorized
- 403: Forbidden
- 500: Internal error
- default: Unexpected error

##### DELETE /tags/{id}

Summary: Delete a tag

Delete a tag object.

Parameters:
- `id` (path, integer, required) — Tag id

Responses:
- 200: Null response
- 401: Unauthorized
- 403: Forbidden
- 500: Internal error
- default: Unexpected error

##### GET /syncs

Summary: List syncs

Get a paginated list of sync operations for the current team.

Parameters:
- `page` (query, integer, optional) — Page number for pagination
- `per` (query, integer, optional) — Number of items per page

Responses:
- 200: Syncs retrieved successfully
- 401: Unauthorized

##### GET /syncs/{id}

Summary: Get sync details

Get detailed information about a specific sync operation.

Parameters:
- `id` (path, integer, required) — ID of the sync to retrieve

Responses:
- 200: Sync details retrieved successfully
- 401: Unauthorized
- 404: Not Found

##### GET /addons/{package}/actions

Summary: Get addon actions

Get all actions for an addon.

Parameters:
- `package` (path, string, required) — Addon package

Responses:
- 200: Action response
- 401: Unauthorized
- 403: Forbidden
- 500: Internal error
- default: Unexpected error

##### GET /addons/{addon_package}/install

Summary: Get installed addon

Get an installed addon.

Parameters:
- `addon_package` (path, string, required) — Addon package

Responses:
- 200: Addon response
- 401: Unauthorized
- 403: Forbidden
- 500: Internal error
- default: Unexpected error

##### POST /addons/{addon_package}/install

Summary: Install addon

Install an addon.

Parameters:
- `addon_package` (path, string, required) — Addon package

Request body: application/json

Responses:
- 201: Addon response
- 401: Unauthorized
- 403: Forbidden
- 500: Internal error
- default: Unexpected error

##### PUT /addons/{addon_package}/install

Summary: Update installed addon

Update an installed addon.

Parameters:
- `addon_package` (path, string, required) — Addon package

Responses:
- 200: Addon response
- 401: Unauthorized
- 403: Forbidden
- 500: Internal error
- default: Unexpected error

##### DELETE /addons/{addon_package}/install

Summary: Delete installed addon

Delete an installed addon.

Parameters:
- `addon_package` (path, string, required) — Addon package

Responses:
- 200: Addon response
- 401: Unauthorized
- 403: Forbidden
- 500: Internal error
- default: Unexpected error

##### GET /addons/{addon_package}/install/permissions

Summary: Get addon permissions

Get all addon permission objects.

Parameters:
- `addon_package` (path, string, required) — Addon package

Responses:
- 200: Permission response
- 401: Unauthorized
- 403: Forbidden
- 500: Internal error
- default: Unexpected error

##### GET /addons/{addon_package}/install/permissions/{name}

Summary: Get addon permission

Get an addon permission object.

Parameters:
- `addon_package` (path, string, required) — Addon package
- `name` (path, string, required) — Permission name

Responses:
- 200: Permission response
- 401: Unauthorized
- 403: Forbidden
- 500: Internal error
- default: Unexpected error

##### PUT /addons/{addon_package}/install/permissions/{name}

Summary: Update addon permission

Update an addon permission object.

Parameters:
- `addon_package` (path, string, required) — Addon package
- `name` (path, string, required) — Permission name

Request body: application/json

Responses:
- 200: Permission response
- 401: Unauthorized
- 403: Forbidden
- 500: Internal error
- default: Unexpected error

##### GET /addons/{addon_package}/install/settings

Summary: Get all addon settings

Get all addon settings objects.

Parameters:
- `addon_package` (path, string, required) — Addon package

Responses:
- 200: Setting response
- 401: Unauthorized
- 403: Forbidden
- 500: Internal error
- default: Unexpected error

##### GET /addons/{addon_package}/install/settings/{name}

Summary: Get addon setting

Get an addon setting object.

Parameters:
- `addon_package` (path, string, required) — Addon package
- `name` (path, string, required) — Setting name

Responses:
- 200: Setting response
- 401: Unauthorized
- 403: Forbidden
- 500: Internal error
- default: Unexpected error

##### PUT /addons/{addon_package}/install/settings/{name}

Summary: Update addon settings

Update an addon settings object.

Parameters:
- `addon_package` (path, string, required) — Addon package
- `name` (path, string, required) — Setting name

Request body: application/json

Responses:
- 200: Setting response
- 401: Unauthorized
- 403: Forbidden
- 500: Internal error
- default: Unexpected error

##### DELETE /addons/{addon_package}/install/settings/{name}

Summary: Delete addon setting

Delete an addon setting object.

Parameters:
- `addon_package` (path, string, required) — Addon package
- `name` (path, string, required) — Setting name

Responses:
- 200: Null response
- 401: Unauthorized
- 403: Forbidden
- 500: Internal error
- default: Unexpected error

##### DELETE /devices/{id}

Summary: Delete a device

Delete a mobile device.

Parameters:
- `id` (path, integer, required) — Device ID

Responses:
- 200: Success response
- 401: Unauthorized
- 403: Forbidden
- 500: Internal error
- default: Unexpected error

##### GET /me/qr

Summary: Get the current account QR code image

Get the current account QR code image.

Responses:
- 200: Image response
- 401: Unauthorized
- 403: Forbidden
- 404: Not Found

##### GET /teams/{id}

Summary: Get a teams

Get a teams object by slug.

Parameters:
- `id` (path, string, required) — Team slug

Responses:
- 200: Team response
- 401: Unauthorized
- 403: Forbidden
- 500: Internal error
- default: Unexpected error

##### GET /users/{id}

Summary: Get a user

Get a user object by slug.

Parameters:
- `id` (path, string, required) — User slug or ID

Responses:
- 200: User response
- 401: Unauthorized
- 403: Forbidden
- 500: Internal error
- default: Unexpected error

##### GET /vendors/{vendor_team_id}/orders

Summary: Get vendor orders

Get all vendor orders.

Parameters:
- `vendor_team_id` (path, string, required) — Team team_id

Responses:
- 200: VendorOrder response
- 401: Unauthorized
- 403: Forbidden
- 500: Internal error
- default: Unexpected error

##### POST /vendors/{vendor_team_id}/orders

Summary: Create an vendor order

Create an vendor order

Parameters:
- `vendor_team_id` (path, string, required) — Team team_id

Request body: application/json

Responses:
- 201: VendorOrder response
- 401: Unauthorized
- 403: Forbidden
- 422: Validation error
- 500: Internal error

##### GET /vendors/{vendor_team_id}/orders/{id}

Summary: Get an vendor order

Get an vendor order object.

Parameters:
- `vendor_team_id` (path, string, required) — Team team_id
- `id` (path, integer, required) — VendorOrder id

Responses:
- 200: VendorOrder response
- 401: Unauthorized
- 403: Forbidden
- 500: Internal error
- default: Unexpected error

##### PUT /vendors/{vendor_team_id}/orders/{id}

Summary: Update an vendor order

Update an vendor order object.

Parameters:
- `vendor_team_id` (path, string, required) — Team team_id
- `id` (path, integer, required) — VendorOrder id

Request body: application/json

Responses:
- 200: VendorOrder response
- 401: Unauthorized
- 403: Forbidden
- 422: Validation error
- 500: Internal error

##### DELETE /vendors/{vendor_team_id}/orders/{id}

Summary: Cancel an vendor order

Cancel an vendor order object.

Parameters:
- `vendor_team_id` (path, string, required) — Team team_id
- `id` (path, integer, required) — VendorOrder id

Responses:
- 200: VendorOrder response
- 401: Unauthorized
- 403: Forbidden
- 500: Internal error
- default: Unexpected error

##### GET /users/search

Summary: Search users

Get all users who's mobile number matches the given search term.

Parameters:
- `term` (query, string, required) — Search term used to filter users

Responses:
- 200: User response
- 401: Unauthorized
- 403: Forbidden
- 500: Internal error
- default: Unexpected error

##### GET /addons/search

Summary: Search addons

Get all addons matching the given search term.

Parameters:
- `term` (query, string, required) — Search term used to filter addons

Responses:
- 200: Addon response
- 401: Unauthorized
- 403: Forbidden
- 500: Internal error
- default: Unexpected error

##### GET /actions/search

Summary: Search actions

Search actions by term.

Parameters:
- `term` (query, string, required) — Search term used to filter actions

Responses:
- 200: Action response
- 401: Unauthorized
- 403: Forbidden
- 500: Internal error
- default: Unexpected error

##### GET /users/verify

Summary: Verify a user account

Verify a user account using the given pin code.

Parameters:
- `pin` (query, string, required) — Verification PIN code
- `user_id` (query, integer, optional) — Optional user identifier to scope the verification lookup
- `email` (query, string, optional) — Optional email used for verification lookup
- `mobile` (query, string, optional) — Optional mobile number used for verification lookup

Responses:
- 200: User response
- 401: Unauthorized
- 403: Forbidden
- 500: Internal error
- default: Unexpected error

#### Models

- Account: A representation of a Account
- AttachmentInput: Object for creating or updating an Attachment.
- Attachment: Object that represents an Attachment.
- User: A representation of a User
- UserInput
- UserID: User ID parameter
- Team: A representation of a Team
- TeamFeatures: Feature flags enabled for the team
- TeamInput
- TeamID
- TeamIDs
- TeamMemberInput: Object for creating or updating a Team Member
- TeamMember: Object that represents a Team Member
- DeveloperInput: Object representing a Tommy developer
- Developer
- Solution
- Chat: A representation of a Chat
- ChatInput
- ChatInitiateInput: Array of user IDs to initiate the chat with.
- ChatUser
- MessageFlag
- ReactionInput
- MessageInput
- Message: A representation of a Message
- AddonView
- AddonLink
- Addon
- AuditLog
- Activity
- Trigger
- Action
- ActionInstall
- TriggerData
- Setting
- SettingData
- FragmentInput: Object for creating or updating an Fragment.
- Fragment: Object that represents an Fragment.
- ContactInput: A representation of a Contact
- Contact
- ContactRequest
- InvitationInput: Object for creating an Invitation.
- Invitation: Invitation for a user to join Tommy
- EventInput: Object for creating or updating an Event.
- Event: Object that represents an Event.
- UserCredentials: User login credentials
- Permission
- GeolocationInput: Object for creating or updating an Geolocation.
- Geolocation: Object that represents an Geolocation.
- WalletInput: Object for updating a Wallet
- Wallet: Object representing a Wallet
- WalletCard: Object representing a Wallet Card
- WalletAccount: Object representing a Wallet Account
- WalletTransactionInput: Object for creating or updating a Wallet Transaction
- WalletTransaction: Object representing a Wallet Transaction
- VendorOrderItemInput: Object for creating or updating an VendorOrderItem.
- VendorOrderInput: Object for creating or updating an VendorOrder.
- VendorOrder: Object that represents an VendorOrder.
- WorkforceInput: Object for updating a Workforce account
- Workforce: Object representing a Workforce account
- WorkforceEmployeeInput: Object for updating an employee
- WorkforceEmployee: Object representing an employee
- WorkforceAvailabilityInput: Object for updating a availability
- WorkforceAvailability: Object representing a availability
- WorkforceShiftQuestion: Object representing a shift question
- WorkforceShiftAnswer: Object representing a shift answer
- WorkforceShiftInput: Object for updating a shift
- WorkforceShift: Object representing a shift
- WorkforceShiftRequestInput: Object for updating a shift request
- WorkforceShiftRequest: Object representing a shift request
- WorkforceTimesheetInput: Object for updating a timesheet
- WorkforceTimesheetBulkInput: Object for bulk updating a timesheets
- WorkforceTimesheet: Object representing a timesheet
- WorkforceTimesheetItemInput: Object for updating a timesheet item
- WorkforceTimesheetItem: Object representing a timesheet item
- WorkforceAttendanceInput: Object for updating an attendance
- WorkforceAttendance: Object representing an attendance
- Device: User device
- Tag: Object that represents a Tag.
- TaggingInput: Object for creating a Tagging.
- Tagging: Object that represents a Tagging.
- Sync: A representation of a Sync operation
- Error: Standard error format
- object

## MCP Server

### tommy

Path: `/mcp`
Version: 0.1.0

Tommy workforce management MCP server. This reference is a placeholder for the RubyLLM and MCP switchover; tools, resources, and prompts will be populated from the Rails MCP registry.
